universalMessages: Thank you for showing up with care, consistency, and purpose.
Your work makes school feel more welcoming and steady.
You help students and colleagues feel seen, supported, and capable.
The patience you bring each day matters more than you know.
Your kindness leaves a mark that lasts beyond the moment.
Thank you for finding solutions when the day gets complicated.
Your steady presence helps others breathe a little easier.
You make hard work look thoughtful, human, and possible.
Thank you for choosing encouragement, even on demanding days.
Your dedication strengthens the whole team.
You bring warmth into spaces where people need it most.
Thank you for noticing the little things that make a big difference.
Your advocacy helps students grow with confidence.
You are part of the reason good things keep happening here.
Thank you for giving your time, energy, and heart so generously.
Your professionalism sets a standard others can trust.
You make people feel like they have someone in their corner.
Thank you for staying flexible, creative, and student-centered.
Your compassion turns ordinary moments into meaningful ones.
You help build a culture where people can keep going.
Thank you for the quiet work that keeps everything moving.
Your care reaches farther than you may ever hear about.
You bring strength without losing gentleness.
Thank you for making room for growth, grace, and progress.
Your teamwork makes challenges feel lighter.
You are appreciated for the knowledge and heart you bring.
Thank you for leading with both skill and kindness.
Your encouragement helps people believe they can do the next hard thing.
You make school brighter by being part of it.
Thank you for being dependable when others need support.
Your optimism helps create momentum.
You bring calm to busy moments and care to important ones.
Thank you for helping students feel valued and capable.
Your hard work creates opportunities for others to succeed.
You make collaboration feel natural and worthwhile.
Thank you for carrying responsibility with such care.
Your example reminds others what service can look like.
You help turn plans into real support for real people.
Thank you for being generous with your experience and insight.
Your presence is a gift to this team.

guests.name: Firstname Lastname
guests.signature: With appreciation for every sample bloom and every note of encouragement.
messages: This is the sample initial message.

guests.name: Joella Allen
guests.signature: With deep appreciation for your resilience, welcoming heart, and steady help for students and specialists alike.
messages: Did NOT have to visit the principal's office.

guests.name: Shannon Cannon
guests.signature: With appreciation for the grace, kindness, refreshing energy, and unmistakable magic you bring.

guests.name: Amanda Fowler
guests.signature: With gratitude for your loyal, honest, student-first work and the perseverance behind it.

guests.name: Ashley Heumann
guests.signature: With appreciation for your top-notch professionalism, caring strength, and calendar-level commitment.
messages: Created the most Google calendars out of any specialist.
Moving on but will be missed so much.

guests.name: Michelle Keen
guests.signature: With gratitude for your heart of gold, hard work, and choice to keep growing with this team.
messages: Glad that you are part of our team and chose to stay.

guests.name: Elizabeth Bearfield
guests.signature: With appreciation for your caring dedication, relationship-building, and unmatched planning spirit.

guests.name: Nikki Erlewine
guests.signature: With gratitude for your strength, caring organization, new-author courage, and perseverance.

guests.name: Julia Garnes
guests.signature: With appreciation for your determination, team-minded work, gracious hosting, and clear progress.
messages: Gracious host in setting up printers for MDR's!
One year survey progress in success!

guests.name: Brandin Glancy
guests.signature: With gratitude for your student-centered care, determination, and perseverance through difficult seasons.

guests.name: Erica Kearns
guests.signature: With appreciation for your professional teamwork, student care, and strong, determined perseverance.

guests.name: Kim McCune
guests.signature: With gratitude for your dependable care, deep experience, and willingness to answer the call.

guests.name: Crystal Pauley
guests.signature: With appreciation for your persevering strength, student-outcome focus, and leadership for new specialists.

guests.name: Nikole Ronk
guests.signature: With gratitude for your leadership, Spring Games excellence, helpful dedication, and professional teamwork.

guests.name: Jennifer Wilson
guests.signature: With appreciation for your dedicated support, student advocacy, and knowledgeable encouragement.
messages: Always ready to advocate for students.

guests.name: Erica Mullins
guests.signature: With gratitude for your student care, leadership in support, perseverance, and experienced dedication.
messages: Stepped up as a leader for student support!

guests.name: Candy Parsons
guests.signature: With appreciation for your cheerleader spirit, helpful heart, growth mindset, and loving dedication.
messages: Always ready to help the team.

guests.name: Judy Pray
guests.signature: With gratitude for your rockstar diagnostician work, family pride, and perseverance through loss.
messages: No one could have a better job as the county diagnostician.
Terrific mom--a graduate and soon-to-be graduate!

guests.name: Gloria Richardson
guests.signature: With appreciation for your Pre-K leadership, loving dedication, encouragement, and growth mindset.

guests.name: Jennifer Williams
guests.signature: With gratitude for your organization, growth mindset, perseverance, and helpful dedication.
